result.column: 是否已生成业务结算单

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助结算数量 ELSE swd.基本结算数量 END), 0) FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON swd.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_INFO swi ON swd.明细编号 = swi.结算明细编号 WHERE s.合同号 = #{contractCode} AND swi.废物类别 = #{wasteCategory} AND s.状态 = '已审核' AND swd.是否删除 = 0 AND swi.是否删除 = 0
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(结算单单号, -4) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 结算单单号 LIKE CONCAT('JSD-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')

SELECT DISTINCT swd.关联来源单号 FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd WHERE swd.关联来源类型 = 'WAREHOUSING' AND swd.关联来源单号 IS NOT NULL AND swd.关联来源单号 IN
#{code}

SELECT s.结算单编号, s.结算单单号, s.合同号, s.合同编号, cust.企业名称, s.结算类型, s.关联来源类型, s.结算周期起, s.结算周期止, s.结算金额, s.已收金额, s.状态, s.制单人编码, s.制单人名称, s.创建时间, s.审核人编码, aud.员工姓名 AS 审核人姓名, s.审核时间, s.审核意见, s.备注, s.是否锁定, s.锁定时间, s.锁定人编码, s.version, s.更新时间, s.更新人编码 FROM SETTLEMENT s LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON s.合同编号 = c.合同编号 LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER cust ON c.客户编码 = cust.客户编码 LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE aud ON s.审核人编码 = aud.员工编码
s.结算类型 = #{settlementType}
AND s.结算单单号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{settlementCode}, '%')
AND s.合同号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractCode}, '%')
AND cust.企业名称 LIKE #{customerName}
AND s.状态 = #{status}
AND s.制单人名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creatorName}, '%')
AND s.结算周期起 <= #{settlementEndTo} AND s.结算周期止 >= #{settlementStartFrom}
AND s.创建时间 >= #{createTimeStart}
AND s.创建时间 <= #{createTimeEnd}
AND s.制单人编码 = #{creatorIdFilter}
AND s.合同编号 IS NULL
ORDER BY
s.结算单编号
s.结算单单号
s.合同号
s.关联来源类型
s.结算周期起
s.结算周期止
s.结算金额
s.已收金额
(s.结算金额 - s.已收金额)
s.已收金额
(s.结算金额 - s.已收金额)
s.备注
s.状态
s.创建时间
s.更新时间
s.创建时间 DESC
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY s.创建时间 DESC
SELECT 合同编号 FROM CONTRACT WHERE 合同号 = #{contractCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.结算单编号, s.结算单单号, s.合同号, s.结算金额, s.已收金额, s.状态, s.结算周期起, s.结算周期止, s.结算类型, s.关联来源类型,
(s.结算金额 - COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN -r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END ), 0)) 可开蓝字金额,
(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN ABS(r.关联金额) ELSE 0 END), 0)) 可红冲金额 FROM SETTLEMENT s LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL r ON s.结算单编号 = r.结算单编号 LEFT JOIN INVOICE i ON r.发票编号 = i.发票编号 WHERE s.合同编号 = #{contractId} AND s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE'
AND s.创建人编码 = #{creatorId}
AND s.状态 IN ('已审核', '已结算')
AND s.状态 = '已结算'
GROUP BY s.结算单编号, s.结算单单号, s.合同号, s.结算金额, s.已收金额, s.状态, s.结算周期起, s.结算周期止, s.结算类型, s.关联来源类型
HAVING (s.结算金额 - COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN -r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END ), 0)) > 0
HAVING (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN ABS(r.关联金额) ELSE 0 END), 0)) > 0
ORDER BY s.结算周期起 DESC, s.结算单编号 DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' THEN 结算金额 ELSE 0 END) as receivableTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' THEN COALESCE(已收金额, 0) ELSE 0 END) as receivablePaid, (SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' THEN 结算金额 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' THEN COALESCE(已收金额, 0) ELSE 0 END)) as receivableUnpaid, SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' THEN 结算金额 ELSE 0 END) as payableTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' THEN COALESCE(已收金额, 0) ELSE 0 END) as payablePaid, (SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' THEN 结算金额 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN 结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' THEN COALESCE(已收金额, 0) ELSE 0 END)) as payableUnpaid FROM SETTLEMENT
结算类型 = #{settlementType}

SELECT t.settlementId, t.settlementCode, t.contractCode, t.partyAName, t.partyASocialCreditCode, t.settlementType, t.headerSourceType, t.status, t.wasteCategory, t.wasteCode, t.wasteName, t.receiveDate, t.detailSourceType, t.sourceOrderCode, t.provinceManifestCode, t.settlementMode, t.baseQuantity, t.baseUnit, t.auxQuantity, t.auxUnit, t.contractPlanTotal, t.auxContractPlanTotal, t.accumulatedQuantity, t.auxAccumulatedQuantity, t.currentAccumulatedQuantity, t.exceedQuantity, t.price, t.exceedPrice, t.exceedAmount, t.amount FROM ( -- 1) 按量结算：一行明细一行危废 SELECT s.结算单编号 AS settlementId, s.结算单单号 AS settlementCode, s.合同号 AS contractCode, c.甲方名称 AS partyAName, c.甲方统一社会信用代码 AS partyASocialCreditCode, s.结算类型 AS settlementType, s.关联来源类型 AS headerSourceType, s.状态 AS status, swi.废物类别 AS wasteCategory, swi.废物代码 AS wasteCode, swi.废物名称 AS wasteName, swd.接收日期 AS receiveDate, swd.关联来源类型 AS detailSourceType, swd.关联来源单号 AS sourceOrderCode, swd.广东省联单号 AS provinceManifestCode, swd.结算模式 AS settlementMode, swd.基本结算数量 AS baseQuantity, swd.基本计量单位 AS baseUnit, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助结算数量 ELSE NULL END AS auxQuantity, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助计量单位 ELSE NULL END AS auxUnit, swd.合同计划总量 AS contractPlanTotal, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助合同计划总量 ELSE NULL END AS auxContractPlanTotal, swd.累积已结算量 AS accumulatedQuantity, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助累积已结算量 ELSE NULL END AS auxAccumulatedQuantity, swd.本次累积量 AS currentAccumulatedQuantity, swd.超出量 AS exceedQuantity, swd.结算单价 AS price, swd.超出单价 AS exceedPrice, swd.超出金额 AS exceedAmount, swd.金额 AS amount, s.创建时间 AS createTime, swd.序号 AS detailSeq FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON swd.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_INFO swi ON swd.明细编号 = swi.结算明细编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON s.合同编号 = c.合同编号 WHERE swd.是否删除 = 0 AND swi.是否删除 = 0
UNION ALL
-- 2) 总价包干 + 合同级：父明细作为结算口径，子明细拆分危废行 SELECT s.结算单编号 AS settlementId, s.结算单单号 AS settlementCode, s.合同号 AS contractCode, c.甲方名称 AS partyAName, c.甲方统一社会信用代码 AS partyASocialCreditCode, s.结算类型 AS settlementType, s.关联来源类型 AS headerSourceType, s.状态 AS status, child_info.废物类别 AS wasteCategory, child_info.废物代码 AS wasteCode, child_info.废物名称 AS wasteName, parent.接收日期 AS receiveDate, parent.关联来源类型 AS detailSourceType, parent.关联来源单号 AS sourceOrderCode, parent.广东省联单号 AS provinceManifestCode, parent.结算模式 AS settlementMode, parent.基本结算数量 AS baseQuantity, parent.基本计量单位 AS baseUnit, CASE WHEN parent.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN parent.辅助结算数量 ELSE NULL END AS auxQuantity, CASE WHEN parent.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN parent.辅助计量单位 ELSE NULL END AS auxUnit, parent.合同计划总量 AS contractPlanTotal, CASE WHEN parent.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN parent.辅助合同计划总量 ELSE NULL END AS auxContractPlanTotal, parent.累积已结算量 AS accumulatedQuantity, CASE WHEN parent.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN parent.辅助累积已结算量 ELSE NULL END AS auxAccumulatedQuantity, parent.本次累积量 AS currentAccumulatedQuantity, parent.超出量 AS exceedQuantity, parent.结算单价 AS price, parent.超出单价 AS exceedPrice, parent.超出金额 AS exceedAmount, parent.金额 AS amount, s.创建时间 AS createTime, parent.序号 AS detailSeq FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL parent JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON parent.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON s.合同编号 = c.合同编号 JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL child ON child.父明细ID = parent.明细编号 JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_INFO child_info ON child.明细编号 = child_info.结算明细编号 WHERE parent.结算模式 = '总价包干' AND s.关联来源类型 = 'CONTRACT' UNION ALL
-- 3) 总价包干 + 入库级（WAREHOUSING）：每条明细一行，不做父子合并 SELECT s.结算单编号 AS settlementId, s.结算单单号 AS settlementCode, s.合同号 AS contractCode, c.甲方名称 AS partyAName, c.甲方统一社会信用代码 AS partyASocialCreditCode, s.结算类型 AS settlementType, s.关联来源类型 AS headerSourceType, s.状态 AS status, swi.废物类别 AS wasteCategory, swi.废物代码 AS wasteCode, swi.废物名称 AS wasteName, swd.接收日期 AS receiveDate, swd.关联来源类型 AS detailSourceType, swd.关联来源单号 AS sourceOrderCode, swd.广东省联单号 AS provinceManifestCode, swd.结算模式 AS settlementMode, swd.基本结算数量 AS baseQuantity, swd.基本计量单位 AS baseUnit, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助结算数量 ELSE NULL END AS auxQuantity, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助计量单位 ELSE NULL END AS auxUnit, swd.合同计划总量 AS contractPlanTotal, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助合同计划总量 ELSE NULL END AS auxContractPlanTotal, swd.累积已结算量 AS accumulatedQuantity, CASE WHEN swd.是否启用辅助核算 = 1 THEN swd.辅助累积已结算量 ELSE NULL END AS auxAccumulatedQuantity, swd.本次累积量 AS currentAccumulatedQuantity, swd.超出量 AS exceedQuantity, swd.结算单价 AS price, swd.超出单价 AS exceedPrice, swd.超出金额 AS exceedAmount, swd.金额 AS amount, s.创建时间 AS createTime, swd.序号 AS detailSeq FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON swd.结算单编号 = s.结算单编号 JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_INFO swi ON swd.明细编号 = swi.结算明细编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON s.合同编号 = c.合同编号 WHERE swd.是否删除 = 0 AND swi.是否删除 = 0 ) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC, t.settlementId DESC, t.detailSeq ASC
